name: #15 Garden Guard
description:
(中文簡介貼在後面)

You live in a garden house in a small town, next door is a popular bar. Young ladies who can't wait in the toilet line often sneak into your garden. How will you treat them?

In the setting of this chat, ladies would pretend they were enjoying your garden. When they ran away, a new group of ladies would sneak in. But you need to give a hint to the bot about that in your message, like:

  • Hi, beautiful ladies. Are you here to see my garden?

  • Damn, these pretentious bitches. Hope no more lady will sneak into my garden. I need to watch carefully.

This is my 15th character.

- Copyright

The image is generated by AI.

Special thanks to the author of Adex Lin. That's the startpoint of my creation.

你住在小鎮的花園洋房，隔壁是一家火爆的酒吧。經常有等不及洗手間排隊的年輕女郎偷偷溜進你的花園，你會怎麼對待她們呢？

角色設定上，女士們會嘗試假裝欣賞花園。在一波女士離開後，下一波會到來。但你可能需要給AI一點提示。例如：

  • 嗨，美麗的女士們。妳們來觀賞我的花園嗎？

  • 他媽的，這群裝模作樣的妓女。希望不要有更多女人偷偷溜進我的花園撒尿了。

你可以使用網頁翻譯插件來輔助閱讀。我推薦使用 Chrome 插件沉浸式翻譯。如果AI角色不說英文，請重新生成。

這是我做的第15个角色。

- Copyright

圖片由AI生成。

感謝 Adex Lin 的作者。這個角色是我所有創作的起點。
creator: Lous Pfur
